event: admitted after left hip and tibia fracture due to road traffic accident
underwent transsphenoidal approach operation for pituitary adenoma 5 years previously
complained of mild dyspnea 10 hours after accident
chest CT showed thromboembolism in right interlobar pulmonary artery
right lower lobe segmental artery thromboembolism
left lower limb venography on 7th hospital day
inferior vena cava filter not inserted
heparin stopped at midnight on day before operation
prothrombin time within normal range on operation day
aPTT within normal range on operation day
no significant changes in BP or HR
pneumatic tourniquet inflated on left thigh 40 min after spinal anesthesia
HR increased to 140 bpm after 15 min CPR
BP increased to 140/90 mmHg after 15 min CPR
BP maintained with epinephrine and norepinephrine
interatrial septum bulging into left atrium
D-dimer increased to 52,796 ng/ml on POD 2
transferred to general ward on POD 30
